name: A quote for more than the wallet balance is rejected at create

parameters.value: None

parameters.value: <engine.api_client.ApiClient object at 0x7fc554567bb0>

parameters.name: from_currency
parameters.value: 'ETH'

parameters.name: to_currency
parameters.value: 'TRX'
